questions.question: What naming convention must composable functions follow?
When two components call the same composable, what happens to their state?
options: They share the same reactive state by default
Each component gets its own independent instance of the state
The second component inherits the first component's state
Vue throws a warning about duplicate composable usage

questions.question: What problem do composables solve that Vue 2 mixins had?
options: Mixins didn't support TypeScript; composables do
Mixins caused property name collisions, unclear data sources, and implicit dependencies
Mixins were too verbose; composables are shorter to write
Mixins couldn't use lifecycle hooks; composables can
